title: Create+
description: A create modpack that uses the useful addons as well as a few Performance mods for the best experience.
body:
Create+ adds a unique twist to the normal experience of the Create mod by add numerous useful create addons to generate more SU and generate more resources. This forge modpack is also balanced out with a few performance mods so that it doesn't get laggy.

**Mod List:**
- AppleSkin
- Botarium
- Canary
- Collective
- Create
- Create Jetpack
- Create: Ore Excavation
- Create: Copycats plus
- Create: Curios Jetpack
- Create: Old Infrastructure
- Create: Power Loader 
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: Structures
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Create: Big cannons
- Curios API
- Custom Credits
- Embeddium
- JEI
- KonKrete
- Kotlin for forge
- melody
- Modpack Manager
- WTHIT
- WTHIT Harvestablility
- Bad Packets
